items.title: Digital Patient Records
items.description: Complete patient profiles with demographics, contact information, insurance details, and medical history all in one secure location.
highlights: Comprehensive patient profiles with all demographics

items.title: Medical History Tracking
items.description: Track complete medical and dental history including allergies, medications, previous treatments, and ongoing conditions.

items.title: Treatment Planning
items.description: Create, manage, and track treatment plans with detailed procedures, timelines, and cost estimates.

items.title: Patient Communication Portal
items.description: Secure patient portal for appointment scheduling, treatment plan viewing, payment processing, and secure messaging.

showcase.title: See Patient Management In Action
showcase.description: Discover how dental practices streamline patient care with our comprehensive management system

testimonials.author: Dr. Sarah Martinez
testimonials.quote: The patient management system has completely transformed how we handle patient records. Everything is organized, secure, and easily accessible from anywhere.

testimonials.author: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: We've reduced administrative time by 50% and our patients love the online portal. It's made our practice so much more efficient.
